name: scientific-research-skill
description: Auditable end-to-end research workflows with default file-based planning, scientific gates, and traceable artifacts.

interface.shortDescription: Auditable research workflow with default planning
interface.longDescription: Coordinate research from idea formation through experiments, paper production, and reviewer revision with project-local planning, explicit evidence boundaries, and human-approved scientific gates.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this research project and resume the next evidence-backed task.
Challenge this idea, search the background, and design decisive experiments.
Map these reviewer comments to evidence, edits, and point-by-point replies.
